query:
SELECT c.id, c.teamMemberId, c.status, c.classification, tm.name as teamMemberName, 
       cg.overallScore, cg.letterGrade
FROM calls c
JOIN team_members tm ON c.teamMemberId = tm.id
LEFT JOIN call_grades cg ON c.id = cg.callId
WHERE c.status = 'completed' 
  AND c.classification = 'conversation'
  AND DATE(c.createdAt) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
